## Tool Name

Which tool needs updating?

## What Changed

- [ ] Tool has been discontinued
- [ ] Pricing or tier structure changed
- [ ] Interface or features changed significantly
- [ ] A better alternative now exists
- [ ] Tool is no longer recommended for this use case

## Details

Describe what changed and when you noticed it:

## Suggested Update

What should the curriculum say instead?

## Affected Sections

Which files or lessons reference this tool? (include file paths if known)
